title: Open model reaches top benchmark tier for code generation
summary: A new open-source model family posts strong benchmark results on code tasks with transparent eval methodology and reproducible checkpoints.

title: DeepMind introduces robotics agent with longer-horizon planning
summary: The team shares research progress on a robotics agent that combines vision-language planning with policy adaptation for multi-step tasks.

title: arXiv: Efficient LLM routing reduces inference cost in agent systems
summary: Researchers propose a routing framework that selects smaller or larger models dynamically, cutting serving cost while keeping quality stable.

title: OpenAI releases evaluation notes for multimodal safety benchmark
summary: The post details methodology, failure classes, and open questions for benchmarking multimodal model safety at scale.

title: Startup launches AI meeting summaries for niche vertical
summary: A product update describes AI-generated meeting summaries and integrations, but includes limited technical depth.

title: Papers with Code: incremental update to leaderboard UI
summary: A platform update improves filtering and layout for paper leaderboards without introducing new research results.

title: Opinion: AI will replace every job next month
summary: A hype-driven opinion piece makes broad claims without evidence, methodology, or links to credible research.

title: Celebrity shares favorite chatbot prompts
summary: A light entertainment article with little technical substance and no relevance to model, benchmark, or research progress.
